entities.name: AMMONIA VOLATILISATION
entities.description: The process of ammonia gas escaping from various sources into the atmosphere, leading to nitrogen loss.

entities.name: NITROGEN LOSS
entities.description: The reduction of nitrogen in a farming system, often through volatilisation.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems focused on raising livestock, specifically dairy farming in this context.

entities.name: GRAZING
entities.description: The practice of livestock feeding on pasture.

entities.name: FERTILISERS
entities.description: Substances added to soil to provide nutrients for plant growth.

entities.name: SOILS
entities.description: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow, acting as a source of ammonia volatilisation.

entities.name: ANIMAL EXCRETA
entities.description: Waste products from livestock that contribute to ammonia volatilisation.

entities.name: FARM SYSTEMS MODELLING
entities.description: The use of mathematical models to simulate and understand farm-scale processes.

entities.name: DAIRYMOD
entities.description: A specific systems model used to simulate daily water, energy, and nitrogen cycles in dairy farming.

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the dairy industry systems were studied.

entities.name: PASTURES
entities.description: Land covered with grass and other low plants suitable for grazing.

entities.name: FEED
entities.description: Food given to livestock, including silage and pasture.

entities.name: ANIMALS
entities.description: Livestock within the dairy farming system.

entities.name: GRASS SILAGE
entities.description: Fermented grass used as livestock feed.

entities.name: MAIZE SILAGE
entities.description: Fermented maize used as livestock feed.

entities.name: DIET N CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of nitrogen within the livestock's diet.

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A measure of how effectively nitrogen is utilized in the farm system to produce output.

entities.name: MILK PRODUCTION
entities.description: The amount of milk produced by the dairy animals.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL AIR QUALITY
entities.description: The state of the air surrounding the farm, affected by ammonia emissions.
